TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi beforefieldinit AgentPoolBlueGreenUpgradeSettings extends System.Object implements class System.ClientModel.Primitives.IJsonModel`1<class Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.AgentPoolBlueGreenUpgradeSettings>, class System.ClientModel.Primitives.IPersistableModel`1<class Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.AgentPoolBlueGreenUpgradeSettings>
Public Class AgentPoolBlueGreenUpgradeSettings Implements IJsonModel(Of AgentPoolBlueGreenUpgradeSettings), IPersistableModel(Of AgentPoolBlueGreenUpgradeSettings)

Docs.summary: Settings for blue-green upgrade on an agentpool.

MemberSignature.Value: public AgentPoolBlueGreenUpgradeSettings ();
.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor() cil managed
Public Sub New ()
public int? BatchSoakDurationInMinutes { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<int32> BatchSoakDurationInMinutes
Public Property BatchSoakDurationInMinutes As Nullable(Of Integer)
member this.BatchSoakDurationInMinutes : Nullable<int> with get, set

Docs.summary: The soak duration after draining a batch of nodes, i.e., the amount of time (in minutes) to wait after draining a batch of nodes before moving on the next batch. If not specified, the default is 15 minutes.

MemberSignature.Value: public string DrainBatchSize { get; set; }
.property instance string DrainBatchSize
Public Property DrainBatchSize As String
member this.DrainBatchSize : string with get, set

Docs.summary: The number or percentage of nodes to drain in batch during blue-green upgrade. Must be a non-zero number. This can either be set to an integer (e.g. '5') or a percentage (e.g. '50%'). If a percentage is specified, it is the percentage of the total number of blue nodes of the initial upgrade operation. For percentages, fractional nodes are rounded up. If not specified, the default is 10%. For more information, including best practices, see: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/aks/upgrade-cluster.

MemberSignature.Value: public int? DrainTimeoutInMinutes { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<int32> DrainTimeoutInMinutes
Public Property DrainTimeoutInMinutes As Nullable(Of Integer)
member this.DrainTimeoutInMinutes : Nullable<int> with get, set

Docs.summary: The drain timeout for a node, i.e., the amount of time (in minutes) to wait on eviction of pods and graceful termination per node. This eviction wait time honors waiting on pod disruption budgets. If this time is exceeded, the upgrade fails. If not specified, the default is 30 minutes.

MemberSignature.Value: public int? FinalSoakDurationInMinutes { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<int32> FinalSoakDurationInMinutes
Public Property FinalSoakDurationInMinutes As Nullable(Of Integer)
member this.FinalSoakDurationInMinutes : Nullable<int> with get, set

Docs.summary: The soak duration for a node pool, i.e., the amount of time (in minutes) to wait after all old nodes are drained before we remove the old nodes. If not specified, the default is 60 minutes. Only applicable for blue-green upgrade strategy.
